description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, the reebok Windstar makes for a perfect floater.UpperPU shell with synthetic leather straps that have velcro closures on the forefoot and midfootPadded fabric patch on the back heel for enhanced abrasion-free comfortErgonomically curved PU footbed with multi-directional lugs for all-day massage feelOutsoleTPR outsole with circular lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for easy movementshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
